title: Defensive Augmentation
effect: By upgrading your nervous and immune systems, you are trained in Might defense and Speed defense tasks. Enabler. Defensive Blinking (4 Intellect points): You enter a heightened reactive state so that when you are struck hard enough to take damage, you teleport an immediate distance in a random direction (not up or down) to help evade the brunt of the attack. Your Speed defense rolls are eased for one minute. Action.
